_meta.keyKnowledge: We acquire, store, manipulate and validate data from various sources using spreadsheets and simple databases.

_source.w: We acquire, store, manipulate and validate data from various sources using spreadsheets and simple databases.
y: Data management skills are essential in virtually every field — science, business, health, government.
Validation ensures our data is accurate and reliable before we draw conclusions from it.
Working with real-world data from multiple sources reflects authentic professional practice.
eg: We import data from external sources like CSV files, APIs or web scraping into spreadsheets.
We design simple database tables with appropriate fields and data types.
We validate data by checking for errors, inconsistencies and missing values.
We use formulas and functions to manipulate and transform data efficiently.
We combine data from multiple sources to create a more complete dataset.
We document our data management process including how we handled quality issues.
